hidden_defects.condition: top-level cash/equity totals could be internally valid while nested position market value or PnL fields were stale or tampered
hidden_defects.impact: dashboard could show detailed holding values that do not reconcile with PAPER portfolio totals
hidden_defects.fix: paper portfolio validation now binds each position market value, unrealized PnL, side, source, and rollup totals

hidden_defects.condition: paper_portfolio_snapshot schema accepted arbitrary position item shapes
hidden_defects.impact: schema checks could pass while UI-critical position detail fields were missing
hidden_defects.fix: position items now have required fields and additionalProperties=false
